codeReview.summary: Clean audit with correct AUDIT marker and well-designed model-based PA validation test. Two files changed: 5-line AUDIT comment added to page_allocator.rs, 44-line pa_validation_on_free test added to buddy.rs. The worker correctly enumerated all 6 unsafe blocks + 1 unsafe impl (Send), applied the 6-category bug checklist, and found no bugs — which is the correct conclusion after independent review. The PA validation model test accurately mirrors the kernel's free_frames() validation logic (pa & 0xFFF == 0 && pa >= RAM_START && pa < RAM_END), uses the correct constants from paging.rs (RAM_START=0x4000_0000, RAM_END=0x5000_0000), and covers all required categories: misaligned addresses (4 cases), below-range (3 cases), above-range (3 cases), valid addresses (4 cases), and boundary alignment assertions (2 cases). The #[cfg(not(test))] gating of the real validation is correctly handled via model-based testing — the standard pattern for this project's host-side test architecture.

summary: Pass. The audit of page_allocator.rs is thorough and correct. All 6 unsafe blocks + 1 unsafe impl verified sound. No bugs found (confirmed by independent review). AUDIT marker accurately summarizes findings. Model-based PA validation test correctly mirrors kernel logic with matching constants and comprehensive coverage of all invalid-input categories. Worker followed the kernel-auditor skill procedure exactly: read file, enumerate unsafe blocks, apply 6-category checklist, write model test (TDD), add AUDIT marker, verify (966 tests pass, kernel builds clean), commit. No shared state gaps identified.
